attacking_style: Opportunistic rider who capitalizes on breakaway situations rather than pure climbing attacks. Takes advantage of transfer/flat stages to contest intermediate sprints despite lacking sprint specialization.
team_tactics: Operates with freedom in breakaways for Burgos team, hunting points and visibility on stages where GC teams allow breaks to succeed. Low domestique support visible in observations.
terrain_preference: Transfer stages and flatter Vuelta stages where breakaways survive. Avoids pure sprint finishes but contests intermediate points when in breaks.
vulnerability: Late-race crashes significantly impact performance though pain tolerance keeps him in race. Limited pure climbing or sprinting ability restricts winning opportunities to breakaway scenarios.
key_patterns: Contests intermediate sprints from breakaways despite no sprint credentials (opportunistic points hunting)
High pain tolerance/abandonment threshold shown by continuing after mid-race crash injuries
Breakaway specialist role for Burgos seeking visibility on non-GC critical stages
form_trajectory: negative: crashed badly mid-Vuelta 2021, though continued racing suggests managed decline rather than collapse
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
